notes: Pure 99-line assembly file with three sorry-free short-proof theorems composing Discriminant.lean (qf_nonneg_of_nonneg_on_coprime/_both) with Reduction.lean (deg_eq_of_frob_det_data) and PairingDet.lean (frob_det_data_of_scaling/symJ). No maxHeartbeats, no instances, no defs; qf_nonneg_of_pairing_scaling is the intended top-level external API export for Weil-pairing scaling witnesses.
